reason: Backend/parser conventions for the local read-only reporter and SQLite/JSONL usage extraction.
Frontend/UI conventions for the Codex plugin panel and tabbed usage views.
Authoritative local data-source research: state SQLite index, session JSONL usage fields, dedupe risks, and privacy constraints.
Plugin surface research: manifest/app/skill patterns, limitations of hooks/plugins for usage data, and panel fallback risks.
Official pricing/cost model research for API-equivalent cost estimates, model mapping, cache pricing, and caveats.
Official Codex UI capability research for CLI/app tab switching limitations and supported plugin invocation surfaces.
